DocumentationExampleSection.Body: Create a workspace, add a small model and one row, then emit SQL and C# outputs from the same model and instance graph.
`meta generate csharp --tooling` emits a typed loaded model and model tooling classes for workspace-backed runtime use.
DocumentationExampleSection.Title: C# representation (meta generate csharp)

DocumentationExampleSection.Body: `instances/*.xml` stores the data for a model. The root element is the model name, each entity's instances are grouped under a deterministic list container element, and relationships are stored as `...Id` attributes on the record.
DocumentationExampleSection.Title: XML instance (instances/*.xml)

DocumentationExampleSection.Body: `model.xml` defines the schema for your metadata workspace: which entities exist, what properties they have, and how entities relate to each other.
DocumentationExampleSection.Title: XML model (model.xml)

DocumentationExampleSection.Body: The same EnterpriseBIPlatform sample can be represented as workspace XML, emitted as SQL, and consumed through generated C# tooling.
`meta generate sql` emits `schema.sql` and `data.sql` as deterministic SQL consumables (DDL and INSERT scripts).
DocumentationExampleSection.Title: SQL representation (meta generate sql)
